subcodes.first_line: O beloved of the age! There was a time when God was, and there was naught beside Him. Soon shalt thou find remoteness even as it once was [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب زمان زمان کان الله و لم یکن معه من شیء فسوف تجد البعد بمثل ما قد کان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
